title: Close-Up Portrait Woman Elegant Traditional South
sourceTitle: Close Up Portrait Woman Elegant Traditional South
prompt: A close-up portrait of a woman with an elegant, traditional South Asian bridal appearance. She has striking brown eyes, well-defined dark eyebrows, a soft winged eyeliner, and glossy berry-pink lips. Her hair is parted down the middle and neatly styled, with a few fine strands resting softly on her forehead. She wears a heavily embroidered gold dupatta over her head, intricately detailed with lattice patterns, beads, and prominent emerald, ruby, sapphire, and turquoise gemstones along the border. Matching ornate gold jewelry, including dangling earrings and a layered necklace accented with pearls and colorful beads, completes her regal and sophisticated look against a warm, golden background.
